name: Hot and Sour Soup with Tofu
recipeIngredient: -seeded and cut into 3/4" x 1/4" strips (about 3/4 cup)
1 small Bunch green onions, cut diagonally into 3/4" pieces (about 1 1/2 cups)
2 cups Chicken broth, canned OR homemade
2 cups Vegetable stock or water (stock recipe in next post)
1/2 lb Snow peas, fresh or frozen
1 lb Firm tofu, drained and cut into 1/2" cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add peppers and onion; stir fry about 5 minutes.
3. Add chicken broth, vegetable stock, and soy sauce.
4. Bring to boiling. Lower heat; simmer for about 5 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, stir together vinegar, red pepper flakes, salt, pepper, cornstarch, water, and sesame oil until smooth.
6. Stir the mixture into the soup with fresh snow peas; cook for about 5 minutes or until thickened and bubbly.
7. Add tofu, frozen snow peas (if using), and water chestnuts. Gently heat through.
